overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval harbor market, exploring wooden docks with tall ships, and entering a stone building. The scene features overcast lighting, half-timbered architecture, and transitions from outdoor waterfront to a dim firelit interior.

agents.ego_description: walking through market area past wooden stalls toward the harbor docks

tall wooden masts with rigging from docked sailing vessels
medieval half-timbered building with stone foundation and wooden beams

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a medieval harbor market with wooden vendor stalls lining a cobblestone street. Geralt walks forward past a merchant standing by his stall, transitioning onto a wooden dock platform. The tall masts of ships are visible in the distance against an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wooden ship dock with scattered cargo

agents.ego_description: walking along weathered wooden dock planks around moored sailing ships

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the edge of the wooden dock

entered.detail: weathered wooden dock surface with gaps between planks
large wooden galleon with distinctive red hull and white sails
wooden crates and barrels stacked on the dock

segments.scene_description: Walking on the open wooden dock surrounded by maritime activity, with a large red-hulled ship moored nearby. The camera moves past cargo crates and barrels scattered across the weathered planks, while the market stalls fade behind. A person sits on the dock edge to the right as the ship masts grow larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated dock platform with medieval warehouses

events.description: ascends wooden stairs to upper dock level near stone buildings

agents.ego_description: walking up wooden stairs to upper dock platform and continuing along waterfront

notable_agents.action: blond-haired villager walking ahead on the waterfront path

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone tower with conical roof visible across the water
wooden staircase leading to elevated dock platform
stacks of canvas-wrapped cargo and coiled ropes

segments.scene_description: The character ascends wooden stairs to an upper dock level, passing piles of cargo and coiled ropes. A stone tower rises in the distance across the water while half-timbered warehouses line the right side. A villager walks ahead on the path as the large red ship disappears behind the dock structures.

events.description: enters stone building doorway from waterfront path
lighting shifts from natural overcast to warm firelight from interior hearth

agents.ego_description: entering stone building and exploring the dimly lit interior with burning fireplace

entered.detail: arched stone doorway with heavy wooden door
stone fireplace with burning fire casting warm orange light
tall wooden shelves lined with pottery jars and supplies

segments.scene_description: Approaching a stone building entrance along the waterfront path, Geralt enters through an arched doorway into a dimly lit interior. The lighting shifts dramatically to warm firelight from a stone hearth. Inside, wooden shelves lined with pottery and supplies line the walls as the character explores the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling medieval harbor market into the dim, firelit interior of a stone building. It begins on a cobblestone street lined with vendor stalls, moving past a merchant before transitioning onto a weathered wooden dock platform under an overcast sky. As the camera advances, the market stalls fade behind and the view opens up to maritime activity, passing cargo crates and a large red-hulled ship. The scene then shifts as the character ascends wooden stairs toward an upper dock level, passing half-timbered warehouses and coiled ropes while a stone tower emerges in the distance. Finally, the camera follows the path to an arched doorway, where the lighting transforms from the gray exterior to the warm glow of a stone hearth inside a room filled with pottery and supplies.
